content: [Task Assignment] T-CTO-047: Execute routine: Deploy pipeline maintenance
[Task Assignment] T-HR-049: Execute routine: Update contractor pipeline status weekly; flag categories with <3 vetted contractors

[Task Assignment] T-OUTREACH-028: Execute routine: Advance all active sequences at designated times only -- weekdays at 10:00 AM and 2:00 PM local prospect time; no weekend, holiday, or off-hours sends
[Task Assignment] T-OUTREACH-036: Execute routine: Cap sequences at 7 touches maximum; gracefully exit non-responsive prospects to 90-day re-engagement queue with suppression flag

[Task Assignment] T-SALES-RESEARCH-038: Execute routine: Update prospect profiles with new signals continuously -- renovation announcements, hiring signals, social media activity changes, competitor dissatisfaction indicators
